blended.narrative: Bogus Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,418 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 22".
